markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on strategy to meet aggressive lead goals.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** To meet a \~136% lead growth goal (1.8k→4.25k/mo), the focus shifts from articles to high-intent tools and templates, which are expected to drive higher-quality conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
  - [**Tools & Templates:** This is the top priority. The goal is to build a comprehensive library, starting with expense, invoice, and accounting templates, to create a central "Tools" page by EOM.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Jon will review the current article backlog to provide feedback on quality issues (e.g., AI patterns, keyword cannibalization) and decide whether to pause the project.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Blockers:** Progress is stalled pending two items: Kirkland's repo access (expected Jan 22/23) and a data export from Kurt.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Topics

### The Strategic Pivot: Meeting Aggressive Lead Goals

  - [**Goal:** Increase quality leads from \~1,800/mo to 4,250/mo by January 2027.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Articles alone cannot achieve this. High-intent tools and templates are the only viable path to drive the necessary conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=2755.0)
  - [**Urgency:** A recent paid search campaign cannibalized organic brand traffic, creating a lead gap that tools must fill immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=2816.0)

### Tools & Templates: The New Priority

  - [**Goal:** Create a central "Tools" page by EOM to house a library of calculators and templates.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Research:** GrowthX found a major market gap in finance templates, confirming the opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
      - [**Expense:** Tracker, report, and policy templates.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
      - [**Invoice:** Generators and templates, identified as a "home run" opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Accounting:** A large category with high potential.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Startup-specific:** Expected to generate higher conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**Execution:** Jon will review GrowthX's template strategy tomorrow. The plan will categorize templates by topic and difficulty, mirroring the Lovable project.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Content Production: Quality & Strategy

  - [**Quality Issues:** Jon identified several issues in recent drafts:](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**AI Patterns:** Repetitive phrasing and excessive citations of a single source.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**Keyword Cannibalization:** Creating new articles (e.g., "Startup Treasury Management") that compete with existing, high-ranking pages (currently P5).](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
      - [**Hetero Hierarchy:** Lack of logical structure, a key signal for AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [**Decision:** Jon will review the article backlog next week to determine if the project should be paused.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**GrowthX Offer:** To improve quality, GrowthX offered to connect Jon with its AI engineers to build custom workflows and share its advanced fact-checking process.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)

### Blockers & Next Steps

  - [**Blocker 1: Kirkland's Access**](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [**Need:** Repo access for Kirkland to begin development.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [**Status:** Jon pinged IT; access expected Jan 22/23.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [**Blocker 2: Data Export**](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Need:** Data for tools (e.g., ChargeFinder) to build pages.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Status:** George is coordinating with Kurt, who has already provided initial feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Once blockers are resolved, GrowthX can deliver a sample end-to-end tool page for review within a few days.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Confirm Kirkland's repo access by Jan 23.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Review the article backlog next week to decide on the project's future.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Review GrowthX's template strategy tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [Coordinate with Kurt to secure the data export.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [Deliver the template strategy for review tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [Schedule a call with Jon and GrowthX's AI engineers to discuss custom workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/2qK7YRez_wMvD87Z8L-DFepwsVNeFqv7?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
